---
title: "Survey"
format: html
---

:::: card
## Zinssatz wählen

<input type="range" id="zins" min="0" max="2" step="0.1" value="0">

::: value
Aktuell: [0.0]{#output} %
:::

<button onclick="submitValue()">

Weiter

</button>
::::

```{=html}
<script>
(() => {

  const init = () => {
    const slider = document.querySelector("#zins");
    const output = document.querySelector("#output");

    if (!slider || !output) return;

    const update = () => {
      output.textContent = parseFloat(slider.value).toFixed(1);
    };

    slider.addEventListener("input", update);

    // wichtig: Initialwert setzen
    update();
  };

  // Quarto-safe init
  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", init);
  } else {
    init();
  }

})();

function submitValue() {
  const val = document.querySelector("#zins").value;
  alert(`Gewählt: ${val}%`);
}
</script>
```
